CONTENT.Honours: SportingPrimeira Liga: 2020–21Taça de Portugal: 2018–19Taça da Liga: 2020–21BragaTaça de Portugal: 2020–21Taça da Liga: 2023–24
CONTENT.Club career: In 2019, Borja was transferred from Toluca to Sporting CP. In February 2021, he joined Braga.
CONTENT.Personal life: On 1 June 2018, Borja's house was attacked by gunmen; he was unhurt but fellow footballer Alejandro Peñaranda was killed and Heisen Izquierdo was injured.He has a daughter named Noah who was born in March of 2020.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 18 May 2024As of match played 17 November 2023
CONTENT.International career: Borja was named in the Colombia national team's provisional squad for Copa América Centenario but was cut from the final squad. He later appeared for Colombia at the 2016 Summer Olympics.Borja was included in the final squad for the 2019 Copa América, acting as a backup to William Tesillo during the tournament.

SUMMARY: Cristian Alexis Borja González (born 18 February 1993) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays for Liga MX club América. Mainly a left-back, he can also play as a central defender.
